TextView.android:text: Load your schedule below, then tap Done to add the widget. Everything else is optional.

1. Open your CRS Schedule page (the one with the Enlisted Classes table).
2. Save it: Ctrl+S -> “Webpage, HTML only” -> pick a file. Or view source with Ctrl+U, select all, copy.
3. Either pick the saved .html file below, or paste the copied source into the box.

Have a .ics calendar file instead (e.g. exported from here previously)? Pick it the same way below — it's imported automatically.
Optional. Added to the search when you tap a class and choose \u201cOpen Maps\u201d, so a room number like \u201cSS 301\u201d resolves to the right campus instead of a random result.

Optional. Set when this schedule actually applies, so the widgets and full schedule show a \u201cnot in session\u201d state outside these dates instead of always treating today as a normal school day.
Optional. Get a notification a few minutes before each class starts. Off by default.
GE: maroon accent, follows your system light/dark setting. NE: fixed dark, Nothing-OS-inspired. Adaptive: matches your phone's wallpaper colors (Android 12+).
Optional. Only appears on the exported schedule image, and only for whichever fields you switch on below.
Optional. Keep a copy of your Form 5 (official study load) attached for quick access -- stored only on this device, never uploaded anywhere.
Tap a class below to manually set or correct its room, instructor, or units, any time -- or add a new one from scratch.
Tap Done to drop the widget on your home screen (or to close after re-loading a schedule).
